CVE-2020-14928.title: evolution-data-server (eds) through 3.36.3 has a STARTTLS bufferi ...
CVE-2020-14928.description: evolution-data-server (eds) through 3.36.3 has a STARTTLS buffering issue that affects SMTP and POP3. When a server sends a "begin TLS" response, eds reads additional data and evaluates it in a TLS context, aka "response injection."

CVE-2026-2604.title: evolution-data-server: Evolution Data Server: Arbitrary file deletion via inconsistent URI handling
CVE-2026-2604.description: No description is available for this CVE.
